title: onosma fastigiata subsp. pyrenaica
intro: Onosma fastigiata subsp. pyrenaica is a plant species in the borage family that is native to the Pyrenees region, characterized by its erect stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Onosma fastigiata subsp. pyrenaica is believed to have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, are sometimes used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
